name: 5 MG Linagliptin Tablets
about: 5 MG Linagliptin Tablets are a general medicine used to treat type 2 diabetes. These tablets contain 5mg of Linagliptin and are available in a pack of 90 tablets. The medicine is manufactured in India and is recommended to be stored in a dry and cool place. The dosage of the medicine should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. These tablets are easy to consume and are in the form of tablets.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage of 5 MG Linagliptin Tablets?
faq.a: The recommended dosage of 5 MG Linagliptin Tablets should be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: What is the packaging quantity of 5 MG Linagliptin Tablets?
faq.a: The packaging quantity of 5 MG Linagliptin Tablets is 90 tablets per box.

faq.q: What are the storage instructions for 5 MG Linagliptin Tablets?
faq.a: The storage instructions for 5 MG Linagliptin Tablets are to keep them in a dry and cool place.

faq.q: What is the origin of 5 MG Linagliptin Tablets?
faq.a: 5 MG Linagliptin Tablets are manufactured in India.

faq.q: What type of drug is 5 MG Linagliptin Tablets?
faq.a: 5 MG Linagliptin Tablets are classified as general medicines.
